channel.title: Kids Play Animal Figures on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux
channel.description: Recent content in Kids Play Animal Figures on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO 31137 Creator 3 in 1 Adorable Dogs Set with Dachshund Pug Poodle Figures and More Breeds Animal Building Toy for Kids aged 7 and Up Gift for Dog Lovers
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 31137 Creator 3 in 1 Adorable Dogs Set with Dachshund Pug Poodle Figures and More Breeds Animal Building Toy for Kids aged 7 and Up Gift for Dog Lovers at the following link: ℹ️: Young animal lovers will love building characterful canines: beagle, poodle and labrador dog figures and role-playing caring for the toy pets The toy pets can also be transformed into a miniature schnauzer and a pug, or a husky and a long-haired dachshund for hours of creative play For unlimited creative fun, let the little ones discover other LEGO Creator 3 in 1 sets: Vintage Motorbike (31135) and Exotic Parrot (31136) Each group of dogs also come with accessories such as a bowl, rubber bone, ball, hairbrush, toy rabbit or dog-walking lead to add extra fun All of the toy dogs from the 3 different groups have posable heads, tails and ears and can fold their legs and paws to sit or stretch out A great treat for dog lovers and a fab gift for animal-loving kids aged 7+ years old to play with or to create fun displays in their bedrooms Kids can create 3 different groups of dogs with this LEGO Creator 3in1 Adorable Dogs toy building set, featuring animal figures from 7 cute breeds 🛒 Check the deal!
